description: It is really important to think about everything you add to your winter capsule wardrobe 2021, if you add anything at all! Just because it is a new season it does not mean that you have to buy from it if you do not need anything. Think about how each item will enhance what you already own instead of buying sometihng on a whim and then trying to make it fit in. For help creating a capsule wardrobe for a limited time only, you can book a free 20-minute consultation with me.
